response: nurse emily organizes a creative writing workshop for the older adults in her care facility she knows that writing can be therapeutic and wants to ensure everyone has the opportunity to participate there are 24 residents interested in joining the workshop emily decides to divide them into groups each containing 6 participants so that each group can have personalized attention and support after forming the groups emily plans to allocate 3 writing prompts per group for the session if each group finishes their prompts and wants to try more emily has prepared an additional set of 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among all the groups how many writing prompts in total will emily need to have prepared for the session including both the initial and extra prompts the initial prompts are 3 per group and there are 4 groups so 3 x 4 = 12 initial prompts the extra prompts are 10 and they are shared equally among 4 groups so 10 / 4 = 2.5 extra prompts per group but since we can't have half a prompt emily will need to round up to 3 extra prompts per group total writing prompts are 12 + (3 x 4) = 24 total writing prompts emily needs to have prepared for the session including both the initial and extra prompts the library contains 24 writing prompts the library is a valuable resource for the older adults in the care facility the library is a place where they can
